NVIDIA's GTC DC announcements included collaborations to scale AI compute for DOE-class systems. The focus: GB200-class nodes, high-speed interconnects, and software stacks that bridge HPC and AI.

## What's included

- Training + high-throughput inference on shared infrastructure
- Data pipelines across simulation, AI surrogates, and analysis
- Support for climate, fusion, and materials modeling

## Why it matters

AI is becoming foundational to scientific discovery. Standardized, validated stacks reduce friction and accelerate time to results across heterogeneous workloads.

-
Sources: GTC DC coverage; DOE lab reports and briefings (Oct 28, 2025)
